shortDescription.default: Asset management for SharePoint and Teams

longDescription.default: Asset Management Hub is a SharePoint Framework (SPFx) solution for SharePoint Online and Microsoft 365. Track hardware, software licenses, assignments, maintenance, depreciation, and inventory with dashboard analytics, bulk operations, report builder, and configurable forms. Includes an SPFx form customizer for native AM_Assets list forms. Requires SharePoint Online.

features.title: Asset Management Hub Feature
features.description: Deploys the Asset Management Hub web part and form customizer for the AM_Assets list.
